checks.evidence: Package exports resolve provider, recorder, coordinate-map, exporter, streams, and command descriptors.
Manifests keep command authority in Manifold, payload schemas in Matter ids, and runtime acquisition outside this package.
High-rate joint frames and validation meshes are streams/artifacts, not command-envelope bodies.
SDF, dynamic-collider, and particle modules consume the same validation mesh and coordinate-map streams used by the recorder/exporter flow.
Matter SDF grids, collider updates, particle sets, diagnostics, and render-neutral payloads are referenced as artifacts instead of embedded in package commands.
The particle render-payload stream carries Matter data only; view, material, camera, color, and renderer policy remain outside this package.
